name: Using spells
description:
To use a spell, type : 'cast 'SPELL NAME' TARGET' . To see your spells,
type 'spells'. E.G. : cast 'meteor shower' astrain or c 'me sh' as.
Note1 : You must have mana to use a spell.
Note2 : Only the magic classes have spells on the first level.
Note3: Type slist to see the skills and spells that you will learn.
Type 'n' to continue.
